author: y4rr
content: [action] Workspace conformance audit dispatch: 17 parallel Sonnet subagents, one per crate (ferrotorch-{core,nn,optim,train,jit,jit-script,serialize,gpu,distributed,cubecl,xpu,distributions,hub,tokenize,llama,ml,mps}). Read-only, file:line citations required, fixed 7-bucket scheme (VALID/WEAK/BROKEN/HARDWARE-GATED/NETWORK-GATED/DEFERRED/TODO). Reports composed into workspace rollup.
